notes: This batch admits the one local result surface that had previously been read only as a comparison anchor in the terrain8 seam batch.
The earlier seam-preservation batch remains valid and is not replaced by this correction.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch

comparison_anchors.relevance: Shows this local result was intentionally kept comparison-only during the earlier seam-preservation pass.
Provides continuity from the prior closure pass whose direct-source coverage turned out to be one file short.
Provides the original filename-level residual inventory baseline used for closure checks.

runtime_expectations: The current local surface is a compact topology4-family summary with four family keys, num_states 4096, lin_trials 512, p0 0.12, and k 0.18.
This batch changes only source admission state inside the intake surface and does not alter the earlier terrain8-admission seam logic.
After this batch, direct-source coverage reaches the full sims inventory.
failure_modes: Treating this correction as if it replaced the earlier terrain8 seam batch.
Rewriting the earlier comparison-only decision as accidental rather than seam-preserving.
Continuing to report incomplete direct-source coverage after this admission.

sims_split_rule.notes: This batch remains inside the separate sims source class and does not mix with ordinary theory/doc extraction.
